title: polystichum spinulosum subsp. dilatatum
intro: Polystichum spinulosum subsp. dilatatum, also known as the Dilated Spiny Polystichum, is a subspecies of the Polystichum spinulosum plant, a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of various phenolic compounds and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Polystichum spinulosum subsp. dilatatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional Chinese medicine. Polystichum spinulosum subsp. dilatatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in the form of dried leaves and roots for its medicinal and health benefits.
